title: Flowchart Diagram Schema
description: Intermediate representation for flowchart and process flow diagrams. LLM extracts structure from natural language into this format, then rendering pipeline generates HTML/SVG from it.

diagramType.description: Identifies this JSON as a flowchart diagram. Must always be 'flowchart'.

title.description: Diagram title, displayed as h1 at the top of the rendered page.

subtitle.description: Optional subtitle shown below the title, typically describing the process scope.
examples: From code commit to production deployment

style.description: Visual style preset. Each style has its own template and design rules. Options: dark-professional (dark tech), hand-drawn (sketch/whiteboard), light-corporate (business/clean), cyberpunk-neon (neon glow/Catppuccin), blueprint (engineering/Nord), warm-cozy (friendly/Gruvbox), minimalist (ultra-clean monochrome), terminal-retro (CRT green-on-black), pastel-dream (soft pastels, rounded).

format.description: Output format. HTML is the default (single-file with inline SVG and CSS). SVG outputs standalone SVG. Mermaid outputs Mermaid text syntax.

density.description: Layout density. compact=tighter spacing for dense diagrams; normal=standard spacing; spacious=generous spacing for presentations.

direction.description: Layout direction. TB=top-to-bottom (default). LR=left-to-right (primary flow horizontal).

nodes.description: Flowchart nodes representing process steps, decisions, I/O operations, etc. Each node is positioned in the flow based on connections.

connections.description: Directed connections (arrows) between nodes. Defines the flow order and branching logic.

swimlanes.description: Optional horizontal swimlanes that group nodes into responsibility bands (e.g., Developer, CI System, QA).

legend.description: Legend entries shown below the diagram. Auto-generated from node types if not provided.

font.description: Optional font override. Replaces the style's default font family. Use a Google Fonts name (e.g., 'Inter', 'Fira Code', 'Merriweather').

colors.description: Optional color overrides. Each key overrides the corresponding semantic color from the chosen style.

metadata.description: Optional metadata for the generated page.

nodeType.description: Shape type of the node. start/end=rounded rect (stadium), process=rectangle, decision=diamond, io=parallelogram, subprocess=double-border rect, document=wavy-bottom rect.

id.description: Unique identifier. Used as connection source/target and layout reference.

label.description: Display text inside the node shape.

type.description: Node shape type. Determines the SVG element and visual treatment.

description.description: Optional short annotation shown below the node in smaller text.

icon.description: Optional icon identifier from the icons catalog. Rendered inside the node shape.

from.description: Source node id. Must reference an existing node id.

to.description: Target node id. Must reference an existing node id.

label.description: Label displayed on or near the connection arrow.

direction.description: The direction the arrow points from source to target. Used for layout routing.

style.description: Line style. Dashed typically used for conditional or optional flows.

branch.description: For decision nodes, indicates which branch this connection represents. 'yes' is the positive/true path, 'no' is the negative/false path, 'default' is the fallback.

label.description: Swimlane label displayed on the left side of the horizontal band.

direction.description: Direction of flow within the swimlane. Horizontal = left-to-right, Vertical = top-to-bottom.

children.description: Node ids contained within this swimlane. Must reference existing node ids.

color.description: Hex color for the legend swatch. Auto-derived from node type if omitted.

type.description: If provided, uses the predefined color for this node type.
